description_long: This is a rectangular, modern shelving unit with a minimalist design, featuring a large, flat panel on the left and four open shelves on the right. The shelves are evenly spaced and provide ample storage or display space for books, decor, or other items. The main structure appears to be made of engineered wood or MDF, finished in a smooth, white coating. The back panel is a contrasting brown, likely a thin fiberboard or hardboard, attached with visible fasteners. The overall construction is boxy and functional, with clean lines and no visible handles or doors. This type of shelving unit is commonly used in urban interiors, such as offices, apartments, or garages, for organized storage.
description: A modern, rectangular shelving unit with four open shelves on one side and a large flat panel on the other, finished in white with a brown back panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large flat panel on the left and four open shelves on the right.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow depth and solid white side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the brown back panel secured with fasteners.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the other narrow white side panel.
